channel.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories
channel.description: Top stories in the U.S. and world news, politics, health, science, business, music, arts and culture. Nonprofit journalism with a mission. This is NPR.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

image.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories

item.title: Louisiana Sen. Bill Cassidy loses in Republican primary, does not advance to runoff
item.description: Sen. Bill Cassidy is one of few remaining Republican senators who voted for President Trump's impeachment after the Jan. 6 attack on the Capitol. Trump endorsed his opponent, Rep. Julia Letlow.
item.content:encoded:
Sen. Bill Cassidy is one of few remaining Republican senators who voted for President Trump's impeachment after the Jan. 6 attack on the Capitol. Trump endorsed his opponent, Rep. Julia Letlow.

(Image credit: Annie Flanagan for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Sam Gringlas

item.title: Napoleon Solo holds off Iron Honor to win the Preakness
item.description: It's the colt's first victory of the year. Kentucky Derby winner Golden Tempo's exit from the race left the field of 14 horses wide open to contest the middle jewel of the Triple Crown.
item.content:encoded:
It's the colt's first victory of the year. Kentucky Derby winner Golden Tempo's exit from the race left the field of 14 horses wide open to contest the middle jewel of the Triple Crown.

(Image credit: Nick Wass)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Bulgarian banger 'Bangaranga' bags country its 1st Eurovision win
item.description: Bulgaria was not among the favorites to win. But performer Dara's catchy, banging anthem bested 24 other nations at the 70th edition of the international singing extravaganza.
item.content:encoded:
Bulgaria was not among the favorites to win. But performer Dara's catchy, banging anthem bested 24 other nations at the 70th edition of the international singing extravaganza.

(Image credit: Helmut Fohringer)
item.dc:creator: Chloe Veltman

item.title: A new Ebola outbreak has already killed 87 people in Democratic Republic of Congo
item.description: Health officials are working to contain a new Ebola outbreak in the DRC of a virus strain with no known vaccine.
item.content:encoded:
Health officials are working to contain a new Ebola outbreak in the DRC of a virus strain with no known vaccine.

(Image credit: Constant Same Bagalwa)
item.dc:creator: Sydney Lupkin

item.title: North America poised for light display of aurora borealis
item.description: The splashy nighttime phenomenon will be best observed on Saturday and Sunday nights
item.content:encoded:
The splashy nighttime phenomenon will be best observed on Saturday and Sunday nights

(Image credit: Charlie Riedel)
item.dc:creator: Alana Wise

item.title: Timmy the humpback whale found dead off Danish coast
item.description: A humpback whale found dead this week off a Danish island has been identified as the animal released two weeks ago in a spectacular and controversial rescue effort after repeatedly becoming stranded off Germany's Baltic Sea coast, Danish authorities said Saturday.
item.content:encoded:
A humpback whale found dead this week off a Danish island has been identified as the animal released two weeks ago in a spectacular and controversial rescue effort after repeatedly becoming stranded off Germany's Baltic Sea coast, Danish authorities said Saturday.

(Image credit: Philip Dulian)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Elephants eat their crops. Farmers strike back. It's a war that's only getting worse
item.description: In Sri Lanka, the islanders revere elephants. But for farmers, there's rising tension that's leading to more fatal encounters — for both humans and hungry pachyderms.
item.content:encoded:
In Sri Lanka, the islanders revere elephants. But for farmers, there's rising tension that's leading to more fatal encounters — for both humans and hungry pachyderms.

(Image credit: Brent Stirton/Getty Images/Reportage Archive)
item.dc:creator: Diaa Hadid

item.title: The townspeople of Vilseck, Germany, worry that Trump may pull out 5,000 U.S. troops
item.description: President Trump's troop withdrawal threat rattles residents of a small Bavarian town reliant on U.S. military personnel and their families for both income and friendships built over decades.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump's troop withdrawal threat rattles residents of a small Bavarian town reliant on U.S. military personnel and their families for both income and friendships built over decades.

(Image credit: Lisi Niesner)
item.dc:creator: Rob Schmitz

item.title: We've seen Isaiah Rashad exposed. Now he's ready to bare his soul
item.description: In the five years since his last album, the Chattanooga rapper retreated from the public eye after a very private betrayal. He emerges with raw new music in pursuit of a warts-and-all self-acceptance.
item.content:encoded:
In the five years since his last album, the Chattanooga rapper retreated from the public eye after a very private betrayal. He emerges with raw new music in pursuit of a warts-and-all self-acceptance.

(Image credit: Quil Lemons)
item.dc:creator: Rodney Carmichael

item.title: Colleges got more rural students to apply. The challenge is getting them to attend
item.description: Some of the nation's most selective institutions are slowly increasing their rural enrollment with the help of millions of dollars from a rural alumnus of the University of Chicago.
item.content:encoded:
Some of the nation's most selective institutions are slowly increasing their rural enrollment with the help of millions of dollars from a rural alumnus of the University of Chicago.

(Image credit: Lucy Lu)
item.dc:creator: Jon Marcus
